result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.cre...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_date,
         DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  -- each reassignment counts for the old owner
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  -- agents who handled > 0 cases within window: either initial owners (cases created in window)
  -- or new owners on transfers within window
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(new_owner) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
GROUP BY ha.agent_id, t.transfer_count
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, ha.agent_id
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_date,
         DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  -- each reassignment counts for the old owner
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  -- agents who handled > 0 cases within window: either initial owners (cases created in window)
  -- or new owners on transfers within window
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(new_owner) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
GROUP BY ha.agent_id, t.transfer_count
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, ha.agent_id
LIMIT 1;

),

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_ts,
         TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS end_ts
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(new_owner) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
GROUP BY ha.agent_id, t.transfer_count
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, ha.agent_id
LIMIT 1;
